title: Implement bd graph command
description:
New command in internal/cmd/graph.go, registered in internal/cmd/root.go.

Usage: bd graph [parent-id] [--waves] [--json]

Tree rendering with back-references:
- DFS traversal of blocking dependencies within each parent group
- Each node appears once at primary position, subsequent refs show ↗ marker
- Status icons: ○ open/ready, ◐ in_progress, ● blocked, ✓ closed
- Annotations: [parent blocked] for inherited, [blocked by: X, Y] for direct
- Parent groups sorted topologically by blocking edges
- Global mode (no args): groups by immediate parent, includes standalone section

--waves: show wave grouping using TopologicalWavesAcrossParents
--json: structured output per design doc schema

See GRAPH_AND_CASCADE_DESIGN.md 'bd graph Command' section. Include unit tests for tree rendering, back-references, annotations, JSON output.
